meta.label: 职场英语 B2
meta.description: 职场常用表达，涵盖会议、邮件、汇报、协商等场景

lessons.title: 会议与讨论
lessons.description: 参加会议、表达观点和讨论议题

sentences.text: I would like to propose a different approach to this problem.
sentences.translation: 我想提出一个解决这个问题的新思路。

sentences.text: Could you elaborate on what you just mentioned?
sentences.translation: 你能详细说明一下你刚才提到的内容吗？

sentences.text: Let us make sure we are all on the same page before moving forward.
sentences.translation: 让我们确保在推进之前大家理解一致。

sentences.text: The main takeaway from this discussion is that we need to prioritize quality over speed.
sentences.translation: 这次讨论的核心结论是我们要优先保证质量而非速度。

sentences.text: I completely agree with your assessment of the current situation.
sentences.translation: 我完全同意你对当前状况的评估。

sentences.text: Shall we schedule a follow-up meeting for next Tuesday?
sentences.translation: 我们安排下周二开一次跟进会议好吗？

lessons.title: 邮件与书面沟通
lessons.description: 商务邮件、报告和书面表达的常用句式

sentences.text: I am writing to follow up on our conversation from last week.
sentences.translation: 我写这封邮件是想跟进我们上周的谈话。

sentences.text: Please find the attached document for your review and feedback.
sentences.translation: 请查收附件文件以供审阅和反馈。

sentences.text: I would greatly appreciate it if you could respond by Friday.
sentences.translation: 如果您能在周五前回复，我将非常感激。

sentences.text: Thank you for your patience and understanding regarding this matter.
sentences.translation: 感谢您对此事的耐心和理解。

sentences.text: Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any further questions.
sentences.translation: 如果您还有任何问题，请随时联系我。

lessons.title: 协商与汇报
lessons.description: 协商条件、汇报进展和提出建议

sentences.text: We have made significant progress since the last quarter.
sentences.translation: 自上个季度以来我们取得了显著的进展。

sentences.text: I believe we can reach a mutually beneficial agreement.
sentences.translation: 我相信我们能够达成一个互利共赢的协议。

sentences.text: What are the key performance indicators we should be tracking?
sentences.translation: 我们应该追踪哪些关键绩效指标？

sentences.text: The deadline has been extended to accommodate the additional requirements.
sentences.translation: 截止日期已延长以适应额外的需求。

sentences.text: I would recommend conducting a thorough risk assessment before proceeding.
sentences.translation: 我建议在推进之前进行彻底的风险评估。
